body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Release so we can use new IC function downstream in ClimaCoupler

Also includes a bugfix that closes #1395. Fix was tested manually from ClimaCoupler and works.

## Dependency updates
```
    Updating `~/clima/ClimaLand.jl/.buildkite/Project.toml`
  [d414da3d] ↑ ClimaCore v0.14.39 ⇒ v0.14.40
  [08f4d4ce] ~ ClimaLand v0.19.0 `..` ⇒ v0.20.0 `..`
  [90137ffa] ↑ StaticArrays v1.9.14 ⇒ v1.9.15
```
title: tag v0.20.0; up deps
